search.queryEditorInfo:
A query is a list of criterias.

In the editor you can edit already added criterias by changing the inputs or delete one by pressing the remove criteria icon button next to the inputs.

To change the order of criteria and groups, or move them to different groups, modify their nesting position using the index/nesting input at the start of each criterion row.

To change how criteria are evaluated together, change the conjunction (AND/OR) between groups/criteria.

You can set a name for groups for better identification. If defined, it will replace the labels in the search bar and saved searches hierarchy.
search.emptyQueryDescription: Your query is currently empty. Create a criteria above to enable the {{button}} button.
search.searchInExtraProperty: Search for "{{query}}" in an extra property

dialogs.deleteLocationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the location "{{name}}"?
dialogs.deleteLocationInfo: This will permanently remove the location and all data linked to its images in Allusion.
dialogs.excludeDirectoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to exclude the directory "{{name}}"?
dialogs.excludeDirectoryInfo: Any tags saved on images in that directory will be lost.
dialogs.deleteTagConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag(s)?
dialogs.deleteTagInfo: Deleting tags or collections will permanently remove them from Allusion.
dialogs.deleteExtraPropertyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{name}}" extra property?
dialogs.deleteExtraPropertyInfo: This will permanently remove the extra property and all of its values from all files in Allusion.
dialogs.removeExtraPropertyConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the "{{name}}" extra property from {{count}} files?
dialogs.removeExtraPropertyInfo: This will permanently remove all of its values from those files in Allusion.
dialogs.overwriteExtraPropertyConfirm: Are you sure you want to overwrite the "{{name}}" extra property from {{count}} files?
dialogs.overwriteExtraPropertyInfo: This will permanently overwrite all of its values from those files in Allusion.
dialogs.deleteMissingFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} missing file{{plur}}?
dialogs.deleteMissingFileInfo: Deleting files will permanently remove them from Allusion, so any tags saved on them will be lost. If you move files back into their location, they will be automatically detected by Allusion.
dialogs.deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} file{{plur}}?
dialogs.deleteFileInfo: You will be able to recover {{them}} from your system's trash bin, but all assigned tags to {{them}} in Allusion will be lost.
dialogs.someFilesCouldNotBeDeleted: Some files could not be deleted.
dialogs.overwriteTagsConfirm: Are you sure you want to overwrite your files' tags?
dialogs.overwriteTagsInfo: This will overwrite any existing tags (a.k.a. keywords) in those files with Allusion's tags. It is recommended to import all tags before writing new tags.
dialogs.restoreDatabaseConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore the database from a backup?
dialogs.restoreDatabaseInfo: Restoring database, please do not close any windows... Allusion will restart automatically.
dialogs.searchItemRemovalInfo: Are you sure you want to delete the search item "{{name}}"?
dialogs.openManyExternalConfirm: Are you sure you want to open {{count}} images in their default application?
dialogs.openManyExternalWarning: This may severely slow down your computer, to the point of it becoming unresponsive.

about.tagline: A local image manager with the file system as the source of truth

errorBoundary.tryOptions: You can try one of the following options or contact the maintainers.

advancedSearch.title: Advanced Search
advancedSearch.name: Name
advancedSearch.criteriaBuilderInfo: A criteria is made of three components: nesting (decides in which group the criteria will be added), key (a property of the image file), operator (decides how the property value is compared), and the matching value. Every image that matches the criteria is shown.
advancedSearch.queryEditorInfo: A query is a list of criterias. In the editor you can edit already added criterias by changing the inputs or delete one by pressing the delete icon button next to the inputs. To change the order of criteria and groups, modify their nesting position. To change how criteria are evaluated together, change the conjunction (AND/OR). You can set a name for groups for better identification.
advancedSearch.emptyQueryMessage: Your query is currently empty. Create a criteria above to enable the {{button}} button.
